name: Taoism
tagline: Stop forcing. Move with the grain of things.
summary: Taoism teaches that the world has its own flow — the Tao — and that wisdom is learning to act with it, not against it. Effortless action, simplicity, and quiet attention are the means; harmony is the result.

quotes.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.text: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
quotes.author: Laozi

quotes.text: Flow with whatever may happen and let your mind be free.
quotes.author: Zhuangzi
